--[[ v1.0.0 https://wearedevs.net/obfuscator ]] return(function(...)local V={"\117\043\110\113\120\090\061\061","\110\080\048\078\104\099\116\077\104\115\073\117\117\116\053\090\069\107\061\061";"\067\081\078\065\048\081\105\085\083\067\079\069\068\085\121\048";"\051\055\069\078\065\089\119\052\053\088\067\050\075\071\066\101";"\048\111\121\122\105\107\061\061";"\098\110\090\053\073\048\117\118\056\090\061\061","\103\107\061\061","\073\098\116\055\119\122\048\043\086\050\076\069\073\109\048\110\055\098\105\061";"\081\114\052\043\068\114\081\070\106\078\055\079\086\114\081\088\086\114\081\056\106\090\061\061";"\116\074\112\049\097\107\071\082\108\103\108\061","\111\047\118\097\086\111\047\112\070\090\078\061","\105\069\116\116\068\107\061\061";"\086\114\087\057\086\098\122\082\048\097\106\061";"\117\057\065\084\076\051\114\084\108\090\061\061","\117\078\109\088\078\076\100\061","\068\111\055\070\119\098\065\074","\097\122\087\074\105\084\061\061","\068\069\081\066\053\098\081\066\105\097\055\116\105\050\075\079";"\099\100\071\115\109\090\073\097\072\068\089\070\076\076\082\089\068\050\079\109\099\084\047\111\087\076\072\050\083\076\069\088\089\077\108\088\055\113\102\047\118\073\056\100\103\081\069\043\110\089\106\069\065\109\054\076\078\070\079\103\103\080\068\078\085\083\075\068\043\115\082\047\054\103\052\075\121\084\118\109\121\097\103\072\070\111\083\048\112\119\089\050\076\052\052\055\054\084\061\061";"\065\108\102\108\107\089\107\081\121\084\061\061";"\048\056\043\106\121\078\121\117\067\052\110\101\100\066\065\111\100\090\061\061","\097\122\087\043\048\097\055\116\086\114\052\082\053\114\109\061","\068\114\121\116\053\114\084\061","";"\052\088\068\099\072\085\090\061";"\122\090\043\051\056\101\074\107\088\072\077\075\122\107\061\061";"\097\122\087\102\053\050\055\079\073\108\061\061","\053\099\078\061";"\090\098\055\056\109\114\052\070\105\098\086\070\105\097\054\112","\098\102\100\086\069\078\109\061","\054\087\121\087\070\122\103\103\101\108\112\070\071\055\047\072\104\049\052\079\113\066\070\077\119\119\054\114\049\085\072\088\0 local j(c,S(l((I%(91024-25488))/(-847985+848241))))end break end N=N+(734308+-734307)end P[V]=w(c)end end end return(function(V,l,T,j,S,v,P,K,X,g,Y,u,Q,A,N,w,B,o,D,h,I,c)h,N,B,Y,o,X,K,u,A,w,D,g,c,Q,I={},-638639+638639,function(V,C)local l=I(C)local T=function()return w(V,{},C,l)end return T end,function(V,C)local l=I(C)local T=function(T,j,S,v,P,D,h)return w(V,{T,j;S,v,P,D;h},C,l)end return T end,function(V)local C,w=-118539-(-118540),V[-794081-(-794082)]while w do end,function(V,C)local l=I(C)local T=function(T,j)return w(V,{T,j},C,l)end return T end,function(V)h[V]=h[V]-(-832286-(-832287))if h[V]==439669+-439669 then h[V],D[V]=nil,nil end end,function(V,C)local l=I(C)local T=function(T,j,S,v,P)return w(V,{T;j,S;v,P},C,l)end return T end,function(w,T,j,S)local b,P,p,R,s,w5,F,i,G,C5,d,X,h,L,W,x,T5,o,U,r,n,e,V5,z,O,M,I,J,t,N,q,j5,a,H,k,m,E,f,l5,Z,y while w do if w<898439+7067318 then if w<-300468+3683775 then if w<576642+1140024 then if w<71932+1113849 then P=h w=h and-209824+12339840 or 143656+1535107 end else if w<2002075-877562 then if w<-267527-(-964144)then w=-644138+2753400 else w=true N=c()D[N]=w I=C(472919+-451531)o=c()P=V[I]X=c()h=T else w=12736803-542964 R=660957-660957 J=#x e=J==R end else if w<2109876-450375 then R=-628480-(-628480)J=#x e=J==R w=e and 13382565-(-628038)or 12571965-378126 else
